meta_title: For Founders: client workflow to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Client Workflow to Solve Project Stagnation
content.seo_description: Stop abandoning projects. Learn an advanced client workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to maintain momentum, ship faster, and scale your SaaS MVP.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is not lack of skill, but lack of a rigid, validated client workflow. By integrating Antigravity for structural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative execution, you decouple design from implementation, ensuring every commit drives toward a revenue-generating milestone rather than feature creep.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a graveyard of half-baked repositories, each one a testament to your initial excitement that died under the weight of scope creep. The 'Founder’s Curse' isn't a lack of vision; it’s the lack of a system that forces your vision into production before the dopamine hit wears off.

To move from idea to exit, you must treat your development process like a high-velocity client project. By adopting a strict, automated client workflow, you remove the friction of decision fatigue, allowing you to ship, measure, and pivot with the precision of a seasoned engineering team.

steps.title: Define the Revenue-First Scope
steps.description: Establish exactly what constitutes a 'shippable' state. Focus on the core value proposition that a customer will pay for immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the business requirements for a [Project Name] MVP. Define a 7-day sprint plan focusing exclusively on the critical path to first payment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Create a project roadmap file named ROADMAP.md based on the revenue-first requirements.'

steps.title: Architect the Data Schema
steps.description: Don't build until the data model is hardened. Use Antigravity to generate a robust schema that prevents future refactoring bottlenecks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Prisma schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application that includes users, subscriptions, and core product data models.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npx prisma format && npx prisma db push'

steps.title: Automate the Feature Scaffolding
steps.description: Leverage AI to write the boilerplate. This eliminates the 'blank page' syndrome and keeps your momentum high.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a clean, modular component structure for the dashboard using Tailwind and React, following atomic design principles.

steps.title: Implement Iterative Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to handle the heavy lifting of business logic while you focus on the UI/UX feedback loop.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the server-side logic for the authentication flow using NextAuth and secure session management.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npm run lint && npm run build'

steps.title: Ship and Validate
steps.description: Deploy to a staging environment immediately. If it's not live, it doesn't exist to your users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment script that validates the build, runs tests, and pushes to Vercel/Cloudflare.

pro_tips: Never start a new file without a JSDoc block explaining why it exists in the context of the user's journey.
Treat every bug report as a feature request to simplify the code, not just fix the error.
Use Claude Code to perform 'code reviews' on your own PRs to identify over-engineering before it merges.
Keep your main branch deployable at all times; use feature flags for unfinished work.
Automate your database migrations; if you're writing manual SQL, you're losing hours of productivity.
content.next_steps: After completing your first sprint, conduct a 'post-mortem' analysis on your velocity. Identify which parts of the code took the longest and use Antigravity to automate those specific modules for your next project.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the methodology to stop spinning your wheels and start printing revenue. Stop building for yourself and start building for your market. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
